mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS plantId, COALESCE(pi.total_value, 0) AS currentPower, COALESCE(dr_today.value_actual, 0) AS dailyAccumulation, COALESCE(pi.efficiency, 0) AS efficiency, p.name AS plantName, p.address AS location,
CASE WHEN dw.sunrise IS NOT NULL AND dw.sunset IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(TIME_FORMAT(dw.sunrise, '%H:%i'), ' / ', TIME_FORMAT(dw.sunset, '%H:%i')) ELSE '--' END AS sunTime,
COALESCE(rad_today.insolation, 0) AS insolation,
CASE WHEN wl.temperature IS NOT NULL AND wl.humidity IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(ROUND(wl.temperature, 1), '°C / ', ROUND(wl.humidity, 0), '%') ELSE '--' END AS weatherStatus,
COALESCE(dr_today.value_actual, 0) * 160 AS totalProfit,
COALESCE(dr_today.value_expected, 0) AS predGen,
160 AS unitPrice,
ROUND(COALESCE(dr_today.value_actual, 0) * 0.424, 2) AS co2Reduction,
FLOOR((COALESCE(dr_today.value_actual, 0) * 0.424) / 6.6) AS treeCount
FROM plant p LEFT JOIN plant_info pi ON p.id = pi.plant_id
LEFT JOIN daily_weather dw ON dw.district_code = p.district_code AND dw.base_date = CURDATE() LEFT JOIN ( SELECT w1.district_code, w1.temperature, w1.humidity FROM weather_log w1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT district_code, MAX(base_time) AS max_time FROM weather_log GROUP BY district_code ) w2 ON w1.district_code = w2.district_code AND w1.base_time = w2.max_time ) wl ON wl.district_code = p.district_code
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT plant_id, ROUND(AVG(ghi), 2) AS insolation FROM radiation_log WHERE DATE(base_time) = CURDATE() GROUP BY plant_id ) rad_today ON rad_today.plant_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT i.plant_id, ROUND(SUM(dr.value_actual), 2) AS value_actual, ROUND(SUM(dr.value_expected), 2) AS value_expected FROM daily_report dr INNER JOIN inverter i ON dr.inverter_id = i.id WHERE dr.base_date = CURDATE() GROUP BY i.plant_id ) dr_today ON dr_today.plant_id = p.id
WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.is_main = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT i.id AS inverterId, i.serial AS serial, i.status_code AS statusCode FROM inverter i INNER JOIN plant p ON i.plant_id = p.id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY i.id ASC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hr.value_actual), 0) AS powerValue FROM hourly_report hr INNER JOIN inverter i ON hr.inverter_id = i.id WHERE i.plant_id = #{plantId} AND DATE(hr.base_time) = CURDATE() AND HOUR(hr.base_time) BETWEEN 6 AND 18 GROUP BY HOUR(hr.base_time) ORDER BY HOUR(hr.base_time)

SELECT COALESCE(AVG(r.ghi), 0) AS insolationValue FROM radiation_log r WHERE r.plant_id = #{plantId} AND DATE(r.base_time) = CURDATE() AND HOUR(r.base_time) BETWEEN 6 AND 18 GROUP BY HOUR(r.base_time) ORDER BY HOUR(r.base_time)
